Beginner's Guide: How Oct 7 changed the Middle East
description: Hamas’s October 7 attack triggered a regional unravelling that had been decades in the making. This piece traces how Iran built the Axis of Resistance after the 1979 Revolution through Hezbollah, Hamas, the Houthis and allied militias, and how Israel, backed by a far more permissive Trump White House, systematically targeted that network. From Soleimani’s killing to covert strikes deep inside hostile territory, the balance of deterrence has shifted. The Axis stands weakened, its leadership disrupted, its aura punctured. Yet the forces that created it remain. The Middle East rarely offers clean endings. The war has changed the region, not concluded it.

title: US-Iran war: Kuwait 'mistakenly' shoots down 3 American F-15s in friendly fire incident
description: Three US F-15E fighter jets crashed in Kuwait early Monday due to a friendly fire incident, according to US central command. All six crew members ejected safely and are in stable condition. The incident occurred amidst escalating regional tensions and Iranian retaliatory strikes, with Kuwait also intercepting hostile drones. The cause is under investigation.

NHL Trade Rumors: $25 million price tag fuels speculation of Leafs-Oilers blockbuster
description: The Toronto Maple Leafs are weighing serious trade interest in winger Bobby McMann as their season slips. With Edmonton leading the chase and contract talks stalled over a reported $5 million AAV ask, Toronto is carefully evaluating offers ahead of the March 6 deadline. Management is not acting out of panic but seeking meaningful return, while multiple teams monitor McMann’s availability.

title: Philadelphia 76ers vs Boston Celtics injury report: head-to-head records and team stats
description: The Philadelphia 76ers face the Boston Celtics at TD Garden on March 1, 2026, in a crucial Atlantic Division matchup. Both teams are significantly impacted by injuries, with Joel Embiid out for Philadelphia and Jayson Tatum still sidelined for Boston. This short-handed contest will heavily feature Tyrese Maxey for the 76ers and Jaylen Brown for the Celtics.

title: 'She has down drome': Brittany Mahomes faces brutal fan reactions following NFL WAGs lineup video
description: Brittany Mahomes drew intense online reactions after appearing in the Sports Illustrated Swimsuit NFL WAGs promo video. While some fans praised her introduction and confidence, many mocked her inclusion and appearance, sparking a heated social media debate. The mixed response highlights the scrutiny NFL partners face and how public visibility often invites both admiration and harsh criticism.

title: After signing Pentagon deal, Sam Altman to Silicon Valley: You have double standards
description: OpenAI has secured a contract with the Department of War for classified network deployment, following earlier discussions about non-classified work. CEO Sam Altman emphasized the need for AI companies to support the US government's mission, pushing back against perceived hypocrisy in the tech industry's stance on geopolitical competition with China.

title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan: I was shocked to find China's Huawei has hired engineers who can...
description: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan expressed shock at Huawei's 100+ CPU architects, developing alternatives to advanced chip tools and lithography. He warned China is rapidly closing the semiconductor gap through engineering and infrastructure optimization, even excelling in open-source AI. Tan urged the US against complacency, stating China could soon lead.

title: CEO of multi-billion software company Workday says AI Agents are not replacing us
description: Workday CEO Aneel Bhusri reassured investors that AI won't replace essential HR software, despite a recent stock dip following a revenue forecast.  The company, which announced 2% workforce cuts, is developing AI agents to enhance, not replace, its enterprise systems, aiming for a consumption-based model.

title: George Kittle’s wife Claire stuns in 49ers-red bikini after SI spotlight
description: Claire Kittle has captured offseason attention with a striking red bikini post following her Sports Illustrated Swimsuit shoot, while George Kittle faces rehab after a torn Achilles. Despite retirement speculation as he nears 33, the 49ers tight end remains determined to return, declaring his love for football and joking that his wife will decide when he is done. Together, the Kittles balance recovery, resilience, and rising visibility.
